zh.lifeSummary: 當John Seymour於1450年出生在英國維爾爾沃爾夫 霍爾時，他的父親John Seymour26歲，母親Elizabeth Coker39歲。他於1468年之前與Elizabeth Darell結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1491年10月26日在他的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Seymour was born in 1450, in Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England, his father, John Seymour, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Coker, was 39. He married Elizabeth Darell before 1468. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 26 October 1491, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Seymour est né en 1450, à Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, John Seymour, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Coker, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Darell avant 1468. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1491, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Seymour 1450 in Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Seymour 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Coker 39. Er hat vor 1468 Elizabeth Darell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Oktober 1491 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Seymour è nato il nel 1450 nel Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, John Seymour, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Coker, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Darell prima del 1468. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 26 ottobre 1491, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Seymour(이)가 1450년 영국 윌츠히르 울프 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Seymour(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Coker(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1468년 이전 Elizabeth Darell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1491년 10월 26일 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Seymour nasceu em 1450, em Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Seymour, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Coker, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Darell antes 1468. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1491, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Seymour родился в 1450 г. в местности волф холл, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Seymour было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Coker, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Darell перед 1468 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 26 октября 1491 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Seymour nació en 1450, en Wolf Hall, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Seymour, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Coker, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Darell antes de 1468. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1491, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
